- [ ] feat — New feature / new content

- [ ] style — Formatting, no content change
- [ ] refactor — Restructuring without content change

- [ ] chore — Maintenance / housekeeping

## Pre-Submission Checklist

- [ ] `npx markdownlint *.md` passes
- [ ] `npx lychee --offline *.md` passes
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (`type(scope): description`)
- [ ] Branch is rebased on the latest `main`
- [ ] If adding a new section/link, the corresponding entry is reflected in
      the website / org-profile / sibling docs as appropriate

## Routing Notice

This repo is the **org landing index**. If your change is for a specific
product (kernel, bootloader, an app, etc.), open the PR in that product's
own repo instead — see the table in [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
